message:
feat(landing): Build marketing landing page for organic discovery

Add comprehensive marketing landing page with the following sections:
- Features grid (8 feature cards with icons and descriptions)
- How It Works (3-step visual workflow)
- Testimonials (placeholder with sample quotes)
- Pricing Preview (Free vs Pro comparison)
- Final CTA section with gradient background

Update Footer with:
- Product links (Browse, Bundles, Workflows, Pricing)
- Resources links (Contribute, How It Was Made, Documentation)
- Legal links (Terms, Privacy, Guidelines)
- Social links (Twitter, GitHub, Email)
- Ecosystem links at bottom

Homepage now includes all marketing sections above the prompt browser,
with smooth scroll navigation between sections.

Closes: jeffreysprompts.com-30k9

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
